feed.title: Harshabrat - personal
feed.subtitle: Hi 👋, I'm a CS student who enjoys exploring technology and learning new things. I share projects, write about what I'm currently working on, and occasionally blog about life and whatever happens to be on my mind.

entry.title: Getting Started with Data Science
entry.summary: Data science sits at the intersection of statistics, programming, and domain knowledge. You do not need a perfect plan on day one. Start with a question, find a dataset, and learn the tools as you go.
